title: Anathallis papuligera
taxonomy: Anathallis papuligera is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Epidendroideae and is part of the tribe Maxillarieae. Further classification places it within the genus Anathallis, which is a group of small, delicate orchids. The genus Anathallis is often associated with the subgenus Specklinnia, adding another layer to its classification. This complex classification reflects the orchid's unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
